data.body: Done (commit pending). shallow_contract_check 3-state (OK/UNKNOWN/ERROR, abstain on combinators/$ref); runtime consumer-input validation in interpreter._run_leaf — fail-loud on mismatch, DISTINCT errored signal on validator failure, skip when no contract; hardened _consumer_input_schema to import steps so it can't false-pass on an empty registry (caught + fixed in verification). Editor unchecked badge (bundle rebuilt). 255 workflow + 307 store tests green; shallow check + runtime fail-loud verified directly.
